chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P N.D- 295 of 2023 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.1345/2023 (Ex.A) 3. For orders on CMA No.1346/2023 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 17.08.2023 On the very first date, when this petition was taken up on 28.03.2023, learned counsel for the petitioner was put on notice to satisfy the Court about the maintainability of this petition. Since then, he has mostly avoided to appear. Today, also none from the petitioner’s side is present. No intimation is received. Accordingly, the petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI Judge Judge ARBROHI
